{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graduate Assistant (Political Science)",
  "description": "The University of Maiduguri is dedicated to fostering intellectual growth and academic excellence through a world-class education rooted in critical thinking, innovation, and ethical leadership. Our vibrant learning environment encourages students to realize their full potential, guided by renowned faculty and enriched by diverse perspectives that prepare them to lead and excel in their chosen fields.

Beyond the classroom, we emphasize research, community engagement, and global collaboration as vital pillars of our mission. With a strong commitment to social responsibility and lifelong learning, we equip our students not only with the skills for success but also with the vision and passion to make a lasting impact in an ever-evolving world.

We invite applications from suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Graduate Assistant (Political Science)

Job Location:&nbsp;Maiduguri, Borno
Faculty: Social Sciences

Requirements


	First degree in the relevant field from University of Maiduguri or another recognised institution
	Minimum of Second Class Upper Division
	NYSC discharge or exemption certificate.&nbsp;


Documents Required
Please prepare the following documents before starting your application:


	Personal Documents:
	
		Current passport photograph
		Birth certificate or declaration of age
		Indigene certificate
		National ID or International Passport.
	
	
	Academic Documents:
	
		Primary School Certificate
		O&#39;Level Certificate (WAEC/NECO)
		Tertiary Institution Certificates
		NYSC Discharge Certificate.
	
	


Note


	All applicants must possess the required qualifications before the closing date of the application.
	Candidates will be required to present original copies of all credentials during the interview process.

Graduate Assistant (Political Science) Job at University of Maiduguri




        
    

        
        The University of Maiduguri is dedicated to fostering intellectual growth and academic excellence through a world-class education rooted in critical thinking, innovation, and ethical leadership. Our vibrant learning environment encourages students to realize their full potential, guided by renowned faculty and enriched by diverse perspectives that prepare them to lead and excel in their chosen fields.

Beyond the classroom, we emphasize research, community engagement, and global collaboration as vital pillars of our mission. With a strong commitment to social responsibility and lifelong learning, we equip our students not only with the skills for success but also with the vision and passion to make a lasting impact in an ever-evolving world.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We invite applications from suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Graduate Assistant (Political Science)

Job Location: Maiduguri, Borno
Faculty: Social Sciences

Requirements


	First degree in the relevant field from University of Maiduguri or another recognised institution
	Minimum of Second Class Upper Division
	NYSC discharge or exemption certificate. 


Documents Required
Please prepare the following documents before starting your application:


	Personal Documents:
	
		Current passport photograph
		Birth certificate or declaration of age
		Indigene certificate
		National ID or International Passport.
	
	
	Academic Documents:
	
		Primary School Certificate
		O'Level Certificate (WAEC/NECO)
		Tertiary Institution Certificates
		NYSC Discharge Certificate.
	
	


Note


	All applicants must possess the required qualifications before the closing date of the application.
	Candidates will be required to present original copies of all credentials during the interview process.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Business & Operations",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full-service Human Resources Consultancy business with a focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development, and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplishes your business goals. We are not your run-of-the-mill HR Company; we believe in team diversity and teamwork, we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team, and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation&rsquo;s needs.&nbsp;Our clients are in various sectors, not limited to engineering, education, health, oil &amp; gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms, and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Business &amp; Operations

Job Location:&nbsp;Utako, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Onsite)
Reports To: Chief Investment Officer

The Role


	We are seeking a strategic leader to drive growth, structure deals, and lead high-performing teams.
	As Head of Business, you will lead overall business strategy, operations, and commercial performance at the intersection of investment and business development.
	This role is ideal for experts in structured finance and asset management who thrive in high-impact environments.
	If you are qualified and ready to lead strategy at an executive level within a forward-thinking, ethical firm, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive business growth, profitability, and AUM expansion.
	Oversee structured finance and alternative, ethical financing solutions.
	Identify new market opportunities, partnerships, and revenue streams.
	Ensure operational excellence, process efficiency, and strong governance.
	Manage key stakeholders and lead results-driven teams.


Requirements and Qualification


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 12&ndash;15+ years in asset management, investment banking, or private credit.
	Proven track record in managing business units and deal execution.
	Deep understanding of multi-asset strategies and alternative investments.
	Strong commercial, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	MBA or equivalent preferred
	Experience with Shariah-compliant finance is a plus.


Salary
N1,500,000 / Month.",

Head of Business & Operations Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

UnoCasa is a full-service Human Resources Consultancy business with a focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development, and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplishes your business goals. We are not your run-of-the-mill HR Company; we believe in team diversity and teamwork, we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team, and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs. Our clients are in various sectors, not limited to engineering, education, health, oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms, and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Business & Operations

Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Reports To: Chief Investment Officer

The Role


	We are seeking a strategic leader to drive growth, structure deals, and lead high-performing teams.
	As Head of Business, you will lead overall business strategy, operations, and commercial performance at the intersection of investment and business development.
	This role is ideal for experts in structured finance and asset management who thrive in high-impact environments.
	If you are qualified and ready to lead strategy at an executive level within a forward-thinking, ethical firm, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive business growth, profitability, and AUM expansion.
	Oversee structured finance and alternative, ethical financing solutions.
	Identify new market opportunities, partnerships, and revenue streams.
	Ensure operational excellence, process efficiency, and strong governance.
	Manage key stakeholders and lead results-driven teams.


Requirements and Qualification


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 12–15+ years in asset management, investment banking, or private credit.
	Proven track record in managing business units and deal execution.
	Deep understanding of multi-asset strategies and alternative investments.
	Strong commercial, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	MBA or equivalent preferred
	Experience with Shariah-compliant finance is a plus.


Salary
N1,500,000 /    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: BIM&ndash;CAD Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	We are seeking a skilled BIM&ndash;CAD Specialist to support our design team in producing accurate structural/civil drawings and BIM models.
	The role requires strong drafting expertise, attention to detail, and proficiency in relevant software.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare structural/civil drawings using AutoCAD, CADS-RC, CADS-SW.
	Develop BIM models and drawings using Revit.
	Produce GA drawings, reinforcement detailing, and bending schedules.
	Prepare shop drawings and support Civil 3D detailing.
	Ensure drawing accuracy, standards, and proper documentation.
	Collaborate with engineers and support BIM coordination (clash detection, updates).


Key Requirements / Qualifications of Ideal Candidate:


	Proficiency in AutoCAD, CADS-RC, CADS-SW, and Revit is essential.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;5 years of hands-on experience in structural/civil drafting or detailing.
	Familiarity with Civil 3D and BIM coordination tools is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of structural detailing, drawing standards, and documentation.
	Ability to organize files, manage drawing versions, and work with minimal supervision.
	Excellent attention to detail, accuracy, and presentation of drawings.


Salary
N180,000 - N400,000 / month.

BIM–CAD Specialist Job at Sanni, Sanni, Ojo & Partners Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Sanni, Ojo & Partners Consulting Limited (SO&P) is a multidisciplinary engineering consultancy with 30+ years of delivering high-quality civil, structural, and project management solutions across industrial, commercial, marine, and infrastructure sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: BIM–CAD Specialist

Job Location: Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled BIM–CAD Specialist to support our design team in producing accurate structural/civil drawings and BIM models.
	The role requires strong drafting expertise, attention to detail, and proficiency in relevant software.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare structural/civil drawings using AutoCAD, CADS-RC, CADS-SW.
	Develop BIM models and drawings using Revit.
	Produce GA drawings, reinforcement detailing, and bending schedules.
	Prepare shop drawings and support Civil 3D detailing.
	Ensure drawing accuracy, standards, and proper documentation.
	Collaborate with engineers and support BIM coordination (clash detection, updates).


Key Requirements / Qualifications of Ideal Candidate:


	Proficiency in AutoCAD, CADS-RC, CADS-SW, and Revit is essential.
	Minimum of 2–5 years of hands-on experience in structural/civil drafting or detailing.
	Familiarity with Civil 3D and BIM coordination tools is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of structural detailing, drawing standards, and documentation.
	Ability to organize files, manage drawing versions, and work with minimal supervision.
	Excellent attention to detail, accuracy, and presentation of drawings.


Salary
N180,000 - N400,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Application – BIM–CAD Specialists industrial, commercial, marine, and infrastructure sectors." as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Email Marketing Specialist",
  "description": "At Pathfinder Consulting, we leverage digital technology to deliver unparalleled experiences for our audience. We are seeking a results-driven Email Marketing Specialist with strong expertise in email strategy, automation, audience segmentation, and performance optimization to strengthen our communication channels and drive conversions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Email Marketing Specialist
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Email Marketing Specialist will be responsible for developing and executing high-performing email marketing campaigns that nurture leads, engage our audience, and drive business growth.
	This role requires a blend of creativity, data-driven decision-making, and technical expertise in email marketing tools and automation systems.


Key Responsibilities


	Email Campaign Management: Plan, create, and execute email marketing campaigns including newsletters, promotional emails, onboarding sequences, and drip campaigns
	Automation and CRM Management: Develop and manage automated email workflows such as lead nurturing, customer journeys, and re-engagement campaigns using CRM and email marketing tools
	Audience Segmentation and Personalization: Segment email lists based on user behavior, demographics, and engagement to deliver highly personalized and targeted campaigns
	Copywriting and Content Development: Write compelling, conversion-focused email copy that aligns with the company&rsquo;s brand voice and marketing objectives
	A/B Testing and Optimization: Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, content, CTAs, and send times to optimize performance and improve open and click-through rates
	Analytics and Reporting: Track, analyze, and report on campaign performance including open rates, CTR, and conversions, using insights to continuously improve results
	Deliverability and Compliance: Ensure best practices for email deliverability, list hygiene, and compliance with email marketing regulations
	Collaboration: Work closely with marketing, sales, and product teams to align email strategies with broader business goals and campaigns
	Trend Analysis: Stay updated with industry trends, emerging tools, and best practices in email marketing and automation


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field
	Experience:2 to 4 years of experience in email marketing, digital marketing, or a related role with a proven track record of successful campaigns.
	Email Marketing Tools: Proficiency in platforms such as Mailchimp, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, or similar tools
	Copywriting Skills: Excellent written communication skills with the ability to craft engaging and persuasive email content
	Data Analysis: Ability to interpret campaign data and translate insights into actionable improvements
	Technical Skills: Basic understanding of HTML and CSS for email design and formatting is an added advantage
	Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy in campaign setup, testing, and execution
	Communication Skills: Strong collaboration and communication skills across teams.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter detailing your experience in email marketing, including tools used and measurable results achieved, to:&nbsp;hr@dtechcentrix.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the&nbsp;subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;We appreciate all applications, but only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Email Marketing Specialist Job at Pathfinder Consulting




        
    

        
        At Pathfinder Consulting, we leverage digital technology to deliver unparalleled experiences for our audience. We are seeking a results-driven Email Marketing Specialist with strong expertise in email strategy, automation, audience segmentation, and performance optimization to strengthen our communication channels and drive conversions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Email Marketing Specialist
Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Email Marketing Specialist will be responsible for developing and executing high-performing email marketing campaigns that nurture leads, engage our audience, and drive business growth.
	This role requires a blend of creativity, data-driven decision-making, and technical expertise in email marketing tools and automation systems.


Key Responsibilities


	Email Campaign Management: Plan, create, and execute email marketing campaigns including newsletters, promotional emails, onboarding sequences, and drip campaigns
	Automation and CRM Management: Develop and manage automated email workflows such as lead nurturing, customer journeys, and re-engagement campaigns using CRM and email marketing tools
	Audience Segmentation and Personalization: Segment email lists based on user behavior, demographics, and engagement to deliver highly personalized and targeted campaigns
	Copywriting and Content Development: Write compelling, conversion-focused email copy that aligns with the company’s brand voice and marketing objectives
	A/B Testing and Optimization: Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, content, CTAs, and send times to optimize performance and improve open and click-through rates
	Analytics and Reporting: Track, analyze, and report on campaign performance including open rates, CTR, and conversions, using insights to continuously improve results
	Deliverability and Compliance: Ensure best practices for email deliverability, list hygiene, and compliance with email marketing regulations
	Collaboration: Work closely with marketing, sales, and product teams to align email strategies with broader business goals and campaigns
	Trend Analysis: Stay updated with industry trends, emerging tools, and best practices in email marketing and automation


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field
	Experience:2 to 4 years of experience in email marketing, digital marketing, or a related role with a proven track record of successful campaigns.
	Email Marketing Tools: Proficiency in platforms such as Mailchimp, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, or similar tools
	Copywriting Skills: Excellent written communication skills with the ability to craft engaging and persuasive email content
	Data Analysis: Ability to interpret campaign data and translate insights into actionable improvements
	Technical Skills: Basic understanding of HTML and CSS for email design and formatting is an added advantage
	Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy in campaign setup, testing, and execution
	Communication Skills: Strong collaboration and communication skills across teams.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter detailing your experience in email marketing, including tools used and measurable results achieved, to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.

Note: We appreciate all applications, but only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Portfolio Manager",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full-service Human Resources Consultancy business with a focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development, and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplishes your business goals. We are not your run-of-the-mill HR Company; we believe in team diversity and teamwork, we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team, and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. UnoCasa is a full-service Human Resources Consultancy business with a focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development, and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplishes your business goals. We are not your run-of-the-mill HR Company; we believe in team diversity and teamwork, we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team, and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs. Our clients are in various sectors, not limited to engineering, education, health, oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms, and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Portfolio Manager

Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Reports To: Chief Investment Officer

Job Description


	We are seeking a disciplined Portfolio Manager to manage and grow our alternative investment portfolios, including Private Equity, Real Estate, and Hedge Funds.
	This onsite role in Abuja focuses on achieving optimal risk-adjusted returns through strategic asset allocation and rigorous research. Apply now to lead our alternative investment strategy.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and implement asset allocation across sectors and instruments.
	Conduct fundamental research to identify and execute high-potential opportunities.
	Monitor portfolios against benchmarks and perform timely rebalancing.
	Adhere to risk frameworks and ethical or Shariah-aligned investment criteria.
	Present performance drivers and strategy updates to the Investment Committee.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, or a related field (Master’s preferred) with 5–8 years in portfolio management or investment analysis.
	Strong investment judgment, financial analysis, and ability to work under market pressure.
	CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or progress toward CFA
	Other relevant investment or capital markets certifications.
